title: Add Rooms to Outlook Calendar Bookings
excerpt: We can’t seem to book ‘rooms’ when using the outlook calendar automation, can we get this please? Ideally it should take it a multiselect.

posts.author: samuelcruickshank (Samuel Cruickshank)
